text.title: Solo Niche Disqualifier Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a specialisation statement + floor rate + hard-no list (≥5) on file?

branch.question: Does the current lead match any hard-no item OR fall below floor OR lack a named decision-maker?

branch.conclusion: Send rejection reply (≤60 words, no counter-offer, optional referral).
Pass to discovery call; budget remains ≤5 minutes pre-call evaluation.
Skip this methodology. Lock specialisation + floor + hard-no list before filtering leads.

text.example: spec=B2B-saas-onboarding floor=$150/h hard-no=[crypto,gambling,...] lead=crypto-exchange → reject per r5.
